scenes.narration: Tu agar Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP) samajh nahi paya, toh Razorpay ka ₹25-50LPA ka offer bhool ja.
Without understanding Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP), systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP) like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP): it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP): fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP) to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Database Connection Pooling (HikariCP) solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
